prompt: Create a soft, high-detail anime illustration of a cute young woman sitting at an outdoor café on a sunny day, shown in a close-up upper-body portrait from a slightly elevated angle. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered solid square censor block in a warm peach skin tone, obscuring the eyes, nose, and mouth while leaving the hair, ears, neck, clothing, and ice cream visible. She has very long flowing pale honey blonde hair with fine individual strands, loose bangs, glossy highlights, and warm backlighting. She wears a feminine spring outfit: an off-white cardigan over a white ruffled blouse with small pale floral embroidery and a thin brown shoulder strap crossing diagonally. She holds a vanilla soft-serve ice cream cone near her mouth in one hand; the cone has a pink paper sleeve with small English text reading “ice cream.” In the softly blurred background, include a sidewalk café or dessert shop window, a leafy green potted plant on the right, wooden bench or railing elements, and exactly 1 standing menu sign on the left showing Japanese text “ミルク バニラ” and the price “¥350” with a small vanilla cone illustration. Use pastel colors, delicate line art, luminous golden sunlight, gentle bokeh, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, and a wholesome romantic slice-of-life mood. Vertical composition, polished modern anime style, highly detailed hair and clothing textures, no extra people, no additional signs, no watermark.
